items.name_en: MiuMiu|New Retro Matte Small Square Bag
items.name_cn:
MiuMiu|New Retro Matte Small Square Bag
Concise and sharp design highlights functionality, soft matte embossed logo, and a grand bag silhouette. Minimalist with no excessive decoration, the bag has ample capacity, serving as a daily commuter bag or a short-trip travel companion. Simple yet not simplistic; almost every fashion blogger has one🌱
Size:22*10.5*7.5cm
Model:5BB142

items.name_en: Model 26039 Black Small Suede
items.name_cn:
Model 26039 Black Small Suede
​【EXPRESS Small Handbag】 M26039 Black M26360 Grey M26905 Ivory White
This Express Small Handbag is a city masterpiece, inspired by the brand's classic Keepall travel bag. Crafted from fine calfskin, it features Monogram classic pattern trim and lining, metal hardware, and the iconic key pouch and padlock, showcasing the essence of Louis Vuitton's travel tradition. The compact size fits daily essentials perfectly, with multiple carrying styles to suit modern urban life.
Dimensions: 17 x 13.5 x 26 cm LPJY60153177
(H x W x L)

items.name_en: Model 30012
items.name_cn:
Model 30012
The new favorite LOEWE Puzzle features a gradient color scheme that looks like sunset hues woven into the bag body
The woven handle is exquisite and unique, giving a relaxed vibe when carried casually
The 3D geometric shape is super spacious, perfect for daily outings or short trips 🎒
Just stuff everything in and go
Wear it on the street and turn heads instantly
Finally understand why fashionistas love LOEWE
Practical and stylish, whoever wears it becomes a walking fashion recommendation 🌿
- 24cm

items.name_en: Model 666218- Summer New Arrival 🌷MCM🌷 Replica. Same as Jo Xin and Wu Xuanyi's Patricia Visetos Mini Crossbody Saddle Bag. This Patricia shoulder bag is a 🌷MCM🌷 classic, based on the classic Patty style, combining Bauhaus-inspired design and craftsmanship, showcasing 🌷MCM🌷's excellent heritage in crafting luxury goods. The bag features a shiny laurel lock on the front, making it an ideal choice for a charming look. Dimensions 7 x 18 x 18

items.name_en: Model 781392 Large
items.name_cn:
Model 781392 Large
Size 34/32/17cm
Gucci Ophidia hobo shoulder bag
Today's vibe is given by the hobo!!!
This bag really fits into daily life, casual yet stylish.
Large capacity but lightweight and compact, perfectly satisfying daily outings.
Plus, the strap is longer than most shoulder bags and adjustable.
Love at first sight, stylish and practical!
